Statements
Standard Statement
This shows a summary of your account activity.
Extended Statement
This shows more detailed information about your account activity including data like charges, commission, source and destination information.
Business Summary Statement
This shows more detailed information about your account activity on a per business basis. It includes information like total Gross Amount, total Net, total charges and total transfer for a business.
Terminal Summary Statement
This shows more detailed information about your account activity on a per terminal basis. It includes information like total Gross Amount, total Net, total charges and total transfer for a terminal.
